classifieds_90.REFLECTION: When the objective requires identifying the "most" or "best" item based on a visual characteristic (like discoloring), it is crucial to carefully examine and compare *all* relevant items on the page. Do not stop at the first item that meets the criteria, but ensure it is indeed the most prominent example by comparing it against all other visible options before making a selection.
